trigger: authoritative saved draft reopened after refresh
focused_field_policy: restore last meaningful field when still visible
visible_result: Continue card resumes the same draft step without inventing a second shell

trigger: cross-session save arrives while local dirty state is still open
focused_field_policy: focus merge sheet title instead of raw field
scroll_policy: keep current scroll until merge sheet is focused
visible_result: Inline merge sheet opens inside the question canvas and groups answers attachments and position separately

trigger: write lease expires before authoritative settlement completes
visible_result: Recovery bridge preserves the last safe draft context and offers one next-safe action

trigger: continuity proof becomes stale or blocked after a save
visible_result: The strip withholds Saved and rebinds through the bounded recovery surface

trigger: promoted request already exists for the same lineage
visible_result: The draft stays superseded and the same-lineage receipt route becomes the lawful recovery target

trigger: durable draft storage degrades during save
visible_result: The shell keeps local context visible but does not claim authoritative saved state
